title: asterocephalus tomentosus
intro: Asterocephalus tomentosus, also known as the hairy asterocephalus, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is an herb used in traditional medicine, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Asterocephalus tomentosus include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in various folk remedies, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
